global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with engaging text and shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting binge-watching with a call to action.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Content area
elements.description: A central area featuring geometric shapes, including a circle and a square, both in lighter shades of purple.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold white text at the top reads 'Binge starts now', prominently displayed against the purple background.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline states 'Cancel anytime', providing additional information.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Watch now' in white, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'MoonScreen' appears in the top left corner, displayed in white against the purple background.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in white, positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern minimalist with bold colors, promoting binge-watching.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Binge starts now, Cancel anytime, MoonScreen, Watch now, UGC
